bead.title: refactor(svelte): bead mutations should invalidateAll() for owner/updatedAt refresh in list
bead.description:
Opus Stage 4 batch review (2026-04-15): BeadDetail.handleClaim / handleUnclaim only update the local panel bead. The parent beads list only reflects the change via liveStatusOverrides (status column only). Owner and updatedAt columns stay stale in the list until invalidateAll().

Fix: success handler should call invalidateAll() from $app/navigation after the mutation returns.
bead.acceptance: (1) After claim/unclaim in BeadDetail, the beads list refreshes and shows the new owner + updatedAt. (2) No visible flicker. (3) beadLifecycle subscription path still fires for other fields.
